packages/pine-compiler/src/convert.ts.reason: Typed Pine lowering coordinator over independently tested semantic, call, statement, drawing and strategy modules; shrinking now would split one stateful conversion transaction.

packages/pine-compiler/src/parser.ts.reason: Bounded recursive-descent grammar implementation whose token cursor and recovery invariants are intentionally cohesive.

packages/strategy-core/evaluator.ts.reason: Canonical exhaustive IR interpreter and vector-series dispatcher shared by preview, backtest, paper and live; node families are golden-parity checked.

packages/strategy-core/ta.ts.reason: Canonical dependency-free TA function library generated into runtime/declarations; functions are independent and direct-tested despite sharing one public module.
